mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO snail_ai_trace (id, agent_id, user_id, conversation_id, name, input, output, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, metadata, tags, model, app_release, version, environment, bookmarked, status, status_message) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.agentId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.conversationId}, #{item.name}, #{item.input}, #{item.output}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.durationMs}, #{item.metadata}, #{item.tags}, #{item.model}, #{item.appRelease}, #{item.version}, #{item.environment}, #{item.bookmarked}, #{item.status}, #{item.statusMessage})
